title: Ubiquiti UACC-Lite-AP-AM - Wallmount for U6-Lite, UAP-nanoHD and a UAP-AC-Lite
description: The plastic wall mount is intended for horizontal installation of Access Points from Ubiquiti, specifically for U6-Lite , UAP-nanoHD and UAP-AC-Lite . The holder is attached to the wall using two screws and dowels, which are included in the package. The overall dimensions of the holder are 149 x 89 x 29 mm
